data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a full audit trail for permission changes.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a full audit trail for permission changes. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or validations that directly address this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail, there are no specific details or evidence demonstrating its implementation or validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or validation of the full audit trail for permission changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the full audit trail for permission changes.
